text: Some individuals who have degrees are people who work in schools. Some person who works in a school is a teacher. As a result, some teachers are individuals with degrees.

premise1.subject: individual who has a degree
premise1.predicate: person who works in a school
premise1.raw_text: Some individuals who have degrees are people who work in schools

premise2.subject: person who works in a school
premise2.raw_text: Some person who works in a school is a teacher

conclusion.subject: teacher
conclusion.raw_text: As a result, some teachers are individuals with degrees

structure.middle_term: person who works in a school

validity_details.reason: Two particular premises (Fallacy of Two Particulars); Undistributed middle term
